subject: [POLICY] Update config and db-migrator to 2.5.0
commit_message:
[POLICY] Update config and db-migrator to 2.5.0

The db-migrator image is upgraded to the
latest release.  Additionally, config changes
to allow DB customization are included.

Issue-ID: POLICY-4343
Signed-off-by: jhh <jorge.hernandez-herrero@att.com>
Change-Id: I9e531d3baf218a30a885bc4258f9fdeb36eaab99
Signed-off-by: jhh <jorge.hernandez-herrero@att.com>

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5768/ : FAILURE

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5768/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5768/ )
